step_rationale: Acute MI biomarker; adenosine signaling/cardioprotection/platelet effects.
mechanism: An adenosine-signaling gene associated with acute MI, modulating cardioprotective and platelet-inhibitory pathways.

references.title: Transcriptomic Profiling Unravels Novel Deregulated Gene Signatures Associated with Acute Myocardial Infarction: A Bioinformatics Approach.
